# Representative Elementary Volume

**Summary**: The smallest volume of material that is representative of the whole.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] determined the REV for different burrow styles to ensure accurate petrophysical measurements.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] Determining REV is critical for ensuring laboratory measurements are scalable to field observations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024]] Analyzed by correlating Vp with core diameter.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The REV for BN samples is larger than standard 1.5-inch plugs, requiring 3-inch or more to capture full burrow networks. ([[2024-allehyani|allehyani, 2024, p. 61]])
